description: TabMail Message List Table View experiment API - handles sender stripping and row `--tag-color` painting for the table view, plus an onUntaggedInboxMessages coverage event.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize table view enhancements (sender stripping + row painting + coverage detection).

events.name: onUntaggedInboxMessages
events.description: Fired when the table-view row painter detects untagged inbox messages that need classification.

weMsgId.description: WebExtension message ID (may be null if not convertible)
